[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A smartphone screen shows a social media comment interface over a city skyline background with a bridge.

The main focus is the layered app interface with multiple comment entries and blue “Premium” claim banners, displayed on top of an image of tall buildings and a large bridge structure.

The setting appears to be indoors in the sense that it is a screen capture; the visible background behind the interface shows an urban skyline with high-rise buildings and a large suspension or cable-supported bridge, under soft daylight with a slightly hazy, pastel sky.

The visual details include a dark, semi-transparent overlay for the comments. At the top, a status bar shows the time “11.41” on the left and several icons on the right. Middle sections show user profile icons on the left and lines of text next to them, with colored badges and small checkmarks. Two large blue rounded rectangles appear, each containing a crown icon on the left, the text “1 Hari Premium,” and smaller text indicating a number remaining (shown as “Tersisa 3 dari 22” in one banner and “Tersisa 4 dari 18” in the other). On the right side of each banner is a white rounded button labeled “Klaim.” Below the top banner area, there is the text “2 Replies.” Near the bottom, another comment line includes a label “Reply” and a yellow pill-shaped label reading “Legendary.” The overall composition is vertical, with comment blocks stacked one after another.

Practical Summary:
The image is a screenshot of a mobile app page displaying a comment thread with user entries. It includes two blue “1 Hari Premium” banners with “Klaim” buttons over a city skyline and bridge background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
